Details: * Indicates the name of the cluster.

* Indicates the NFS storage name for the NFS storage to be used by this slurm cluster.
* This is defined in storage_config.yml as nfs_name.

* Indicates how the Slurm configuration files are provided to the cluster.
* <conf name> : <filepath> or <dict>

    The conf files supported by slurm are slurm, cgroup, gres, mpi, helpers, job_container, acct_gather, oci, plugstack, and topology
* Each entry can be specified in one of two ways:

    * <filepath>: Either provide an absolute path to an existing configuration file on omnia_core.

         .. Warning:: Ensure that all the values are provided including the node and partition details. Also, the cluster name is overwritten using the name in this file for slurm.
    * <dict>: Supply the configuration values directly as a key–value map.
